flashcards.back: A whole number that can be positive, negative, or zero (e.g. ..., -3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3...).

flashcards.front: Where are Positive Numbers located relative to zero on a horizontal number line?
Where are Negative Numbers located relative to zero on a horizontal number line?
Is Zero a positive or negative integer?

flashcards.back: $-2$ (because it is further to the right on a number line, representing a higher value).
